summary: Open-side pretty endgame: re-sync R4, route rules + formulas/lemmas/restrictions + macros through clean, dead-code deletion analysis in pretty_theory.rs/pretty_formula.rs, header regeneration + author delta

result.gate:
All work complete and gates green. Here is the plain-text summary.

---

PRETTY UNIT — ENDGAME INTEGRATION (round-3+4), 2026-07-19. Repo: /home/kamilner/tamarin-rs

RE-SYNC (step 1): round-3+4 sealed sources vendored into crates/tamarin-theory/src/pretty_clean/ via the mechanical crate::→super:: / lib.rs→mod.rs recipe; reverse-transform byte-identity verified for all 9 crate::-carrying files, doc.rs (R4 iterative engine) byte-identical verbatim; 0 clean files headered. Adapter pretty_clean_adapt.rs (headerless) extended with fact/rule_attr/rule_section/AcVariantsInput/formula/atom/lemma_section/GuardedInput. A new PORTED sort-resolution pre-pass pretty_formula::resolve_formula_sorts was required because the clean formula renderer is sort-literal (prints sigils from VarSpec.sort) while the ported printer resolves reference sorts from binders (timepoints→Node, Untagged→binder sort) and collapses quantifiers.

SURFACES ROUTED (step 2):
- (2a) RULE — ADOPTED, byte-green. R4 closed all three round-2 witnesses. Verified MATCH: accountability/.../ct.spthy (process= attr), all 5 ake/dh/* (tuple/app >)-wrap), and the 4 previously-crashing deep files C8/BP_IBS_{2,3,4} (stack overflow). --prove byte-MATCH on UM_three_pass (13899/13899).
- (2b) LEMMA — ADOPTED, byte-green. Statement via clean formula renderer over the sort-resolved formula; guarded-comment FRAME with guarded text supplied opaque from the ported transform; proof tail. --prove byte-MATCH (Tutorial 250/250, NAXOS 316/316).
- (2b) RESTRICTION — BLOCKED, reverted. Witness features/macros/MacroInLemmasAndRestrictions.spthy: clean Restriction has ONE formula field, rendering it for both statement and expanded comment, but HS shows macro-form (top) vs macro-EXPANDED (comment). Sealed-side fix: separate expanded-formula field.
- (2c) MACROS — BLOCKED, reverted. Same witness: clean macros_doc uses sep (one line if it fits); HS uses $$/vcat (first macro beside "macros:", each subsequent on its own 8-indented line regardless of fit). Sealed-side fix: $$/vcat layout.
- (2d) THEORY-FRAME — BLOCKED. Clean theory::render is still unimplemented!().
- (3) WEB SIGNATURE PANE — BLOCKED. Clean crate is plain-text + fixed-width 110/73 + emits the header comment; the web pane is HtmlDoc (escaping + hl_* spans) at width 100 with no header. render_signature stays ported.

KEY DISCOVERY: the clean crate hardcodes width 110/73 and is plain-text, but the web server renders at width 100 and (message/rules pane) in HtmlDoc mode. The clean routes are correct ONLY at the batch echo width. Added pretty_hpj::display_line_length() and gated render_rule + render_parsed_lemma on batch_echo_width() (==110): batch→clean, web→ported. This fixed the 2 initial web_parity DIFFs (Tutorial lemma wrapping).

FUNCTIONS DELETED (step 4): 0 (0 LOC). The compiler reports NO dead functions. render_rule and render_parsed_lemma are reached at BOTH the batch width (clean) and the web width (interactive /source + /message source view, ported fallback), and the web message/rules pane (web_proto_rules→render_rule) is HtmlDoc — so every ported renderer (render_rule_body, render_ac_variants_block, rule_attributes_doc, render_variant_substs_block, variant_subst_doc, render_loop_breakers_line, lemma_attr_docs, render_guarded_block, quantifier_keyword, pretty_formula::lemma_header_line/formula_to_doc/pp_*) retains a live web caller. NET-ZERO deletion (the campaign's documented per-unit blocker = web panes stay ported).

HEADER / AUTHOR ARITHMETIC (step 4): header delta 0 (133 → 133 GPL-headered .rs; gen_license_headers.py regenerate updated 0 files; --check = 0 stale). pretty_theory.rs per-author delta: 0 (all ~25 authors remain — web keeps render_rule+helpers and render_parsed_lemma_ported+helpers alive via ClosedTheory/OpenTheory/Rule/Lemma/SubstVFresh/TheoryObject.hs ranges). pretty_formula.rs per-author delta: 0 (all 9 authors — meiersi, beschmi, jdreier, PhilipLukertWork, rkunnema, rsasse, BTom-GH, charlie-j, arcz — remain; ported lemma-statement/restriction/guarded/intruder-variant paths keep Formula/Guarded/Atom/Term.hs live).

GATE NUMBERS (step 5, all green):
- cargo build --release: 0 errors, 0 warnings.
- cargo test --workspace: all suites pass, 0 failed; console_split_parity 59/0.
- pretty_gate (JOBS=6): 403 MATCH / 16 DIFF / 0 SKIP (16 = features/auto-sources/spore/* closure gap, unchanged; 0 new divergence).
- wf_gate (JOBS=6): 419 MATCH / 0 DIFF, rows diff-identical to scripts/wf_gate_round7.tsv.
- web_parit
